access_token.description: LinkedIn member OAuth2 access token (resolved from legacy's credentials.access_token secret). Sent as a Bearer token; never logged. The refresh_token exchange is performed outside this connector.

base_url.description: LinkedIn Marketing API base URL override for tests or proxies.

linkedin_version.description: LinkedIn-Version header value (monthly, YYYYMM). Defaults to the connector's built-in version.

max_pages.description: Maximum pages; use 0, all, or unlimited to exhaust the stream.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
